steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase "Supported by biochemical analyses of over 2,000 skeletons" must logically describe the thing that is supported by those analyses. It should modify findings from a study, not vegetables, grains, or diets themselves.

steps.title: Reject dangling modifiers
steps.content: Choice A makes vegetables and grains seem supported by the analyses. Choice B makes the diets themselves seem supported by analyses. Choice C also places the diet components where the modifier cannot logically attach.

steps.title: Name the supported findings
steps.content: The remaining choice makes findings from a 2022 study the noun supported by biochemical analyses. The answer is D.
